inputs.label: standard
inputs.style: The photojournalism of James Nachtwey — stark, high-contrast black and white, unflinching close-up portraits, available light only, subjects in crisis or conflict contexts
inputs.subject: A healthcare worker removing protective equipment after a long shift, exhausted, in a corridor
inputs.use: Editorial illustration for a magazine article about healthcare worker burnout

inputs.label: minimal
inputs.style: Wes Anderson film aesthetic — symmetrical composition, pastel palette, whimsical precision
inputs.subject: A librarian standing in the middle of a long corridor of bookshelves

inputs.label: european
inputs.style: The architectural photography of Hélène Binet — stark geometric abstraction, concrete surfaces, dramatic natural light cutting through built spaces, black and white with extreme tonal range
inputs.subject: The interior stairwell of a brutalist housing estate in London or Marseille
inputs.use: Social media imagery for an architecture criticism newsletter
